name: hpsatviews
description: High-performance command-line tool for processing GOES-R geostationary satellite imagery (ABI L1b/L2). Generates grayscale, pseudocolor, and RGB composite views (true color, ash, airmass, day/night blend) from NetCDF data. Optimized with OpenMP parallelization and pre-compiled Rayleigh correction LUTs for near-real-time throughput on commodity hardware.

affiliation.name: Laboratorio Nacional de Observación de la Tierra (LANOT), Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México (UNAM)
